debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
⊢ Tendsto (fun x => Real.sin (r * x) / x) (nhdsWithin 0 {0}ᶜ) (nhds r)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
simp [Real.sin_zero]

          exact h₄
        simpa [mul_zero] using h₂
      have h₂ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / (r * x)) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := by
        have h₃ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := by
          -- Use the known limit sin(x)/x → 1 as x → 0
          exact Real.tendsto_sin_div_self
        have h₄ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
          have h₅ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 0) := h₁
          have h₆ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
            have h₇ : ∀ᶠ (x : ℝ) in 𝓝[≠] 0, r * x ≠ 0 := by
              filter_upwards [self_mem_nhdsWithin] with x hx
              intro h₈
              apply hx
              have h₉ : r * x = 0 := h₈
              have h₁₀ : x = 0 := by
                apply mul_left_cancel₀ (sub_ne_zero.mpr h)

              simp_all
            have h₈ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 0) := h₁
            have h₉ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝[≠] 0) := by

              filter_upwards [h₇] with x hx

            exact h₉
          exact h₆
        have h₇ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / (r * x)) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := by
          have h₈ : (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / (r * x)) = (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) ∘ (fun x : ℝ => r * x) := by

            simp [mul_comm]
            <;> field_simp [h]

          have h₉ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := h₃
          have h₁₀ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝[≠] 0) := h₄
          have h₁₁ : Tendsto ((fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) ∘ (fun x : ℝ => r * x)) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := h₉.comp h₁₀
          exact h₁₁
        exact h₇
      have h₃ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
        have h₄ : (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) = (fun x : ℝ => r * (Real.sin (r * x) / (r * x))) := by

  exact h_main
